_comment: THE PHYSIO config (canon, committed). Cadence = how often each bus file is expected to refresh (hours); grace_frac widens it before a stale bleed fires. Gates = the volumes at which fitted organs earn their voice (THE_ORGANISM: 'every new organ ships behind a speak-gate'). The Governor is constitutionally absent from the signal table — physio.mjs hardcodes that exemption.
